rules.name: VENUE_AT_MOST_ONE
rules.description: One venue hosts max one team per time slot

rules.name: COACH_NO_OVERLAP
rules.description: One coach coaches max one team per time slot

rules.name: COACH_PLAYER_NO_OVERLAP
rules.description: A coach-player cannot be in two roles simultaneously

rules.name: TEAM_NO_OVERLAP
rules.description: A team cannot have two sessions at the same time

rules.name: MIN_SESSIONS
rules.description: Each team gets at least its effective minimum sessions
